ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-06-2024 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-13-2024 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-18-2024 Continued To Nov-13-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-23-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated December 08, 2021 is admitted to probate. Maria Marta Andrade is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status for final distribution is set for January 28, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Shirley Yawitz is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Chavez. Not reported.
